However, in this context, it appears normal.\n\n### Claims Based on Assumptions:\n- No claims in the reports are based on unfounded assumptions; they all logically conclude these files are benign.\n\n### Consistency of Scores:\n- The scores are consistent with the content and analysis provided.\n\n---\n\n### Final Assessment:\n- **Malware:** 0 across all files — appropriate.\n- **Obfuscated:** 0 across all files — appropriate.\n- **Risk:** Mostly 0, with a slight 0.1 for report 3, justified by the presence of embedded source map data, which is standard but could be misused in malicious contexts.\n\n### My Own Estimate:\nGiven the analysis, I concur with the existing scores.
